data.title: Bitcoin plummeted to $105,000 due to U.S.–China tariff issues, with $19 billion futures deleveraging event, causing concern.
data.description: Bitcoin is currently experiencing a reset phase, following a significant crypto liquidation event that is one of the largest in years. The cryptocurrency reached a new all-time high surpassing $126,000 in early October, only to reverse course due to escalating U.S.-China tariff tensions. This led to a massive $19 billion futures deleveraging, marking one of the largest in the history of crypto markets. The reset phase is highlighted by reduced leverage, a sense of caution among investors, and the hope for a rebound in demand. ETF inflows have also been weakening, contributing to the prevalent bearish sentiment. For more details, the complete story can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Natural Killer Cell therapies in Immunotherapy market worth $254B revolutionized by CAR-NK cells, engineered to evade immune system, enhance cancer destruction.
data.description: A news commentary by Equity Insider reported on behalf of GT Biopharma, Inc. stated that MIT and Harvard researchers have developed specialized CAR-NK cells that are designed to evade detection by the immune system and demonstrate enhanced efficacy in combating cancer. This breakthrough was achieved on October 17, 2025, in Vancouver, BC. The engineered CAR-NK cells show promise in significantly improving cancer treatment due to their ability to effectively target and destroy cancer cells.

data.title: Protext Mobility, Inc. (OTC: TXTM) plans website redesign and IR suite for better transparency & shareholder engagement.
data.description: Protext Mobility, Inc. has revealed its intention to revamp its corporate website and introduce an upgraded Investor Relations Suite. This initiative aims to improve transparency and boost shareholder engagement. The redesign will feature a modern interface with user-friendly navigation. The company plans to invest approximately $100,000 in this project. By enhancing its online presence, Protext Mobility, Inc. seeks to provide investors with easier access to relevant information and financial updates, ultimately fostering stronger connections with its shareholders.

data.title: Middle East data center analysis report: $12 billion investment in upcoming data centers by 2027, Saudi Arabia leads with 60% market share.
data.description: Dublin-based ResearchAndMarkets.com has introduced the "Middle East Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database, featuring notable data center operators including Khazna Data Centers, Saudi Telecom Company (center3), and SDS Data Center leading by capacity across the region. The Middle East is poised to witness approximately $12 billion in fresh investments directed towards upcoming data centers by 2027. Saudi Arabia stands out as a dominant player in this segment, commanding nearly 60% of the upcoming data center market in the Middle East.

data.title: Russia leads Europe in crypto adoption: Chainalysis reports rapid DeFi growth & rise in large transfers, signaling increased use for financial services.
data.description: The DeFi sector in Russia is rapidly expanding, with a noticeable increase in large-value transfers. This growth is seen as a sign of the rising adoption of cryptocurrency for financial services in the country. Chainalysis, a blockchain analysis company, has reported these developments, highlighting the significant numbers associated with the trend.

data.title: Collapse of Crypto-Backed Stocks: Market-to-NAV ratios plummet, some trading below 1.0 value of Bitcoin or Ethereum held. Dilution, panic selling fueling death spiral in financial illusion. Gap widens between asset value and market perception. Company's balance sheet strengthens while equity valuation weakens. Retail investors facing declines while BTC soars. Grim options for firms as unsustainable models shatter.
data.description: The article discusses the collapse of the digital asset treasury company (DATC) model, highlighting the structural precariousness of the current situation. Market-to-Net Asset Value (mNAV) ratios are plummeting, with companies like Strategy trading at a steep discount from their previous premiums. Some companies, like Bitmine Immersion and SharpLink, have seen their mNAV dip below 1.0. The core issue is nonstop dilution, as these firms rely on At-The-Market (ATM) equity programs to raise capital, leading to a self-cannibalizing cycle. Retail investors are losing confidence as their holdings lag behind Bitcoin's performance. The article emphasizes the need for fundamental changes to address the widening gap between asset value and market perception before the situation worsens.

data.title: OpenAI halts Martin Luther King Jr. videos due to racist content created by users on its Sora app.
data.description: The Sora video app has been used by individuals to create offensive and occasionally racist portrayals of the civil rights leader.

data.title: Wolters Kluwer presents UpToDate Expert AI at HLTH 2025, empowered with clinical AI to streamline decision-making.
data.description: Wolters Kluwer Health, based in Waltham, Massachusetts, is set to exhibit the advancements in clinical decision support through Expert AI at HLTH 2025, specifically at booth #3218. The focus will be on showcasing the capabilities of the newly introduced UpToDate Expert AI. This AI tool is tailored to provide healthcare institutions with reliable, evidence-driven AI assistance. By integrating UpToDate Expert AI, healthcare providers can enhance clinical processes and expedite well-informed decision-making using enhanced clinical insights. Alongside this, Wolters Kluwer Health will introduce other cutting-edge solutions at the event.
